final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster — a 3×3 nine-grid vertical layout designed for Chinese social media platform 小红书 (Xiaohongshu), formatted at 3:4 ratio so the full image can be sliced into 9 equal individual cards after export.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic poster, ins-style minimalist layout, soft healing aesthetic, light skeuomorphic illustration accents, magazine-quality typography, new-media design sensibility — think polished 小红书 knowledge-sharing viral cover aesthetic
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row grid, each cell separated by a thin visible border or clear gutter so cutting lines are unambiguous; every cell is self-contained and centered; no text or headline bleeds across cell boundaries; generous internal padding within each cell; overall vertical 3:4 canvas
Subject: nine individual card-style cells, each a complete standalone graphic unit with Chinese headline, body text, and a small healing illustration icon — unified visual language across all nine
Scene/backdrop: overall background in creamy white / light beige / oat / pale caramel tones; each cell shares the same warm neutral palette; no busy backgrounds
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, calm, healing — like a quiet bedroom at night; gentle and feminine; zero aggressive marketing energy
Color palette: primary tones are 奶油白、浅米色、淡燕麦色、浅焦糖色; deep brown used sparingly for all body text and headlines; small illustration accents in warm amber and soft moonlight ivory; palette must feel cohesive and tender across all nine cells
Materials/textures: flat illustration style with subtle soft shadow on icons; clean sans-serif Chinese typography; light paper-like texture on cell backgrounds optional
Text (verbatim):
  第1格 — 大标题：「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」副标题：「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」配图元素：柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩
  第2格 — 标题：「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」正文：「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」配图元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情小插画
  第3格 — 标题：「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」正文：「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」配图元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  第4格 — 标题：「3. 房间温度别太高」正文：「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」配图元素：空调、温度计、被子
  第5格 — 标题：「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」正文：「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  第6格 — 标题：「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」正文：「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  第7格 — 标题：「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」正文：「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  第8格 — 标题：「7. 固定上床时间」正文：「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
  第9格 — 标题：「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」正文：「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」底部小字：「收藏这组，今晚试试看」配图元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星
Constraints: all text must be Chinese only — no English, no garbled characters; every cell must be fully readable after slicing to its individual size; grid lines or gutters must be clearly visible to guide cutting; cell 1 functions as the hero cover and should be the most visually striking; typography must be neat, large, and legible — prioritize readability over decoration; overall image must look like a real publishable 小红书 九宫格 knowledge post
Avoid: English text anywhere, garbled or corrupted Chinese characters, text overlapping grid boundaries, cheap marketing clip-art style, overly busy backgrounds, gradient overload, neon or cold colors, dark mode aesthetics, any element that makes the grid cuts ambiguous
